title: T-130 — WIRING: Pipeline page tabbed view switcher (Kanban + Table + Split) NPD-f slice of T-060
prompt:
# T-130 — Pipeline page view wiring

PRD: docs/prd/01-NPD-PRD.md §17.8, §17.12
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/pipeline.jsx:133-208 (Pipeline page wrapper)
Parent root: T-060

## Goal
Wire the three pipeline view modes (Kanban from T-059, TableView from T-128, SplitView from T-129) into a single tabbed pipeline route page driven by URL ?view=kanban|table|split. Filter and sort state is shared across all view modes via URL search params (?filter=, ?sort=, ?dir=).

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/page.tsx (RSC) reads ?view, ?filter, ?sort, ?dir, ?selected — fetches projects (with filter applied) — passes data to a Client wrapper.
2. The Client wrapper renders shadcn Tabs (Kanban | Table | Split); active tab driven by URL ?view= (default kanban); switching tabs preserves ?filter/?sort/?dir/?selected.
3. Shared filter chips + search input rendered above tabs by the wrapper; updates URL search params; all three views consume the same filtered project list.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/page.tsx [modify]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/_components/pipeline-tabs.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/_components/__tests__/pipeline-tabs.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the pipeline page mounts at /(npd)/pipeline, when ?view=kanban|table|split is in the URL, then the matching view renders inside shadcn Tabs (no page reload on switch) — verified by RTL routing test
2. Given a user changes filter or sort, when the change settles, then URL search params update and all three views consume the same filtered/sorted list — verified by RTL
3. Given a user switches view modes, when the new tab activates, then ?filter, ?sort, ?dir, and ?selected (where applicable) persist across the switch — verified by RTL

## Test strategy
- RED: pipeline-tabs.test.tsx asserting tab switching, URL persistence, shared state before wiring exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test pipeline-tabs'

## Risk red lines
- Do not duplicate filter/sort state per view — must be shared via URL
- Do not implement view components here (use T-059/T-128/T-129 outputs)
- Do not break URL persistence contract from §17.12
